column1: # Controls how ZAP treats each alert type.
# PASS  = ZAP ignores this alert type
# WARN  = ZAP reports it but doesn't fail the build
# FAIL  = ZAP fails the build if this alert fires
# For Pillar 1 everything is WARN — we want to SEE findings without blocking.
# In Pillar 2 (CI hardening) we promote critical alerts to FAIL.
# ── Missing security headers (passive checks — no attack needed) ──────────────

column3: Web browser XSS protection not enabled
Information disclosure — sensitive info in URL
Server leaks version info via Server header
Server leaks info via X-Powered-By header
Content Security Policy (CSP) header not set
